productDisplayName: Puma Men Track Cat Basic White Casual Shoes
description: A stylish jogging and walking shoe, the puma Track cat Basic is replete with features to enhance your performance and help you shape up faster. Team this with performance clothes when hitting the track or the gym, or simply pair it with jeans and tees  to look your casual best.  UpperSynthetic leather upper with overlays on the sides for durability and enhanced shoe structureLace-up system for a snug, customised Fit Padded tongue and fabric collar for in-step comfort and a snug fitPadded footbed for all-day comfort and shock absorptionMidsolePU midsole for lightweight comfort, durability and impact protection OutsoleTPR outsole with exaggerated herringbone grooves for grip and traction Terraced grooves on the toe region for added grip Curved forefoot for better traction
